name: finance-mcp-server
title: Finance MCP Server — 39 Tools, No API Key Required
description: Comprehensive financial data MCP server for Claude and other AI assistants. 39 tools covering Forex (ECB), Crypto (Binance/CoinGecko), Macro Economics (World Bank + FRED), Stocks, ETFs, Portfolio Analytics, Earnings Calendar, and Market Sentiment. Zero API keys required for 34 tools.
